attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT AS BK_SHIPSET_NUMBER_INT,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
NSC.BK_CARTON_ID AS BK_CARTON_ID,
COALESCE( SSED.ROUTE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS RETURN_ROUTE_CODE,
COALESCE( SSED.REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS RETURN_REASON_CODE,
CAST(SSED.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CREATION_DT,
SSED.CREATION_DATE AS CREATION_DTM,
SSED.RTV_ID AS  RTV_NUMBER_INT,
SSED.STATUS AS RETURN_TO_VENDOR_STATUS_CD,
CASE WHEN NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as WITH_SLC_ROLE,
CASE WHEN (NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME IS NULL AND SSED.SLC_INT_SLC_NAME = 'INT-SLC') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as RU_IN_TRANSIT_ROLE,
NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME AS RU_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME,
CAST((SSED.ATTRIBUTE2 (DATE, FORMAT'DD-MMM-YY')) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_RETURN_TO_CM_FROM_SLC_DTM,
CAST(CAST(SSED.ATTRIBUTE2  AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RU_DV_RETURN_TO_CM_FROM_SLC_DT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER as EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' as ACTION_CD,
CASE WHEN NRTV.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END as DML_TYPE
FROM
(SELECT 
SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
ORDER_NUMBER,
CARTON_NUMBER	,
SLC_INT_SLC_NAME	,
RTV_ID	,
CREATION_DATE	,
REASON_CODE	,
ROUTE_CODE,
ATTRIBUTE2,
STATUS
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE	
UNION
SELECT 
SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
ORDER_NUMBER,
CARTON_NUMBER	,
SLC_INT_SLC_NAME	,
RTV_ID	,
CREATION_DATE	,
REASON_CODE	,
ROUTE_CODE,
ATTRIBUTE2,
STATUS
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE	) SSED
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON SSED.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
ON SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
AND  NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC
ON SSED.CARTON_NUMBER=NSC.BK_CARTON_ID
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_STRATEGIC_LOGISTICS_CENTER NSLC 
ON NSLC.BK_STRTGC_LOGISTICS_CNTR_NAME =SSED.SLC_INT_SLC_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_TO_VENDOR NRTV
ON NRTV.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
AND NRTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NRTV.BK_CARTON_ID=NSC.BK_CARTON_ID

SELECT RTV_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,SHIP_SET_NUMBER,CARTON_NUMBER,DELIVERY_ID,SHIP_TO_COUNTRY,OPERATING_UNIT,ORDER_TYPE,STATUS,SLC_INT_SLC_CODE,SLC_INT_SLC_NAME,SHIP_PREFERENCE,ERROR_MESSAGE,SHIP_TO,SHIP_FROM,REASON_CODE,TELESERVICE_CASE,HOLD_STATUS,ROUTE_CODE,LAST_UPDATED_BY,LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATION_DATE,REQUEST_ID,PROGRAM_ID,ATTRIBUTE1,ATTRIBUTE2,ATTRIBUTE3,ATTRIBUTE4,ATTRIBUTE5,ATTRIBUTE6,ATTRIBUTE7,ATTRIBUTE8,ATTRIBUTE9,ATTRIBUTE10,ATTRIBUTE11,ATTRIBUTE12,ATTRIBUTE13,ATTRIBUTE14,ATTRIBUTE15,CANCEL_HOLD_OVERRIDE,ORG_NAME,GLOBAL_NAME,SOURCE_DML_TYPE,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,REFRESH_DATETIME 
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_RTV_IFACE SSED
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON SSED.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
ON SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
AND  NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON NSC
ON SSED.CARTON_NUMBER=NSC.BK_CARTON_ID
WHERE NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT is NULL or NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT is NULL or NSC.BK_CARTON_ID is NULL
